***REMOVED***babel-plugin-transform-es2015-spread

> Compile ES2015 spread to ES5

#***REMOVED***Installation

```sh
npm install --save-dev babel-plugin-transform-es2015-spread
```

#***REMOVED***Usage

##***REMOVED***Via `.babelrc` (Recommended)

**.babelrc**

```js
// without options
{
  "plugins": ["transform-es2015-spread"]
}

// with options
{
  "plugins": [
    ["transform-es2015-spread", {
      "loose": true
    }]
  ]
}
```

##***REMOVED***Via CLI

```sh
babel --plugins transform-es2015-spread script.js
```

##***REMOVED***Via Node API

```javascript
require("babel-core").transform("code", {
  plugins: ["transform-es2015-spread"]
});
```

#***REMOVED***Options

* `loose` - All iterables are assumed to be arrays.
